title: heterotheca hirsutissima
intro: Heterotheca hirsutissima, also known as hairy false goldeneye, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to North America, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits such as antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Heterotheca hirsutissima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
